ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country belongs (e.g., Europe, Asia, Americas) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., overall performance, economic performance) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for the indicator */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking */,
  "ranking_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the user's action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data (e.g., CSV file, Excel spreadsheet) */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File path to the exported data */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "export_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)
